author: exouser
name: Local A100 PR60 Stack Repro
blurb: Non-record 16MB track: local 1xA100 reproduction of the PR60-style stack (10L, FP16 tied embedding export, Muon WD, overtone init, residual mix, sliding eval). Reproducible under 600s train cap with final roundtrip val_bpb 1.41057617.
notes: Single-GPU local throughput bottleneck compared with multi-GPU leaderboard environment.
